extraction_method: image (7 PNG menu scans, no text)
notes: Menu published as 7 flat PNG image scans (RR-ONLINE_MENU-01..07.png) — no machine-readable text. 21+ classic cocktail bar; little/no dinner food. TWO issues: (a) image-only menu requires OCR/vision to extract, and (b) this may not belong in a DINNER spread at all — beverage-led venue. Decision needed (ties to §9 open question): cap or exclude pure cocktail bars from a meal-centric spread, or only admit as a ≤1 'activity/nightcap' slot.
